appSubtitle: Dynamic mood guided by your city weather.
compareSubtitle: Compare the current city weather against another city.
hourlySubtitle: Temperature line and rain chance bars (1h intervals).
hourlyTapHint: Tap a point to see details.
forecastSubtitle: Mini cards by period: morning, afternoon and night.
travelTimeSubtitle: Real-time local time for favorite cities.
travelTimeEmpty: Add favorite cities to follow timezones.
uvRiskMinimal: Minimal risk. Sunscreen is recommended for very sensitive skin.
uvRiskHigh: High risk. Requires sunscreen, hat, and shade.
uvRiskVeryHigh: Very high risk. Avoid midday sun, use extra protection.
uvRiskExtreme: Extreme risk. Full protection required, avoid sun exposure.
weatherDescriptionIdle: Search for a city to start.
forecastEmptyIdle: Search for a city to load the upcoming forecast.
hourlyEmptyIdle: Search for a city to view the 12h chart.
searchInvalid: Use letters only in the city name.
searchAmbiguous: More than one city found. Select the correct option from the list.
compareAmbiguous: More than one city found for comparison. Be more specific.
compareNoCurrent: Load a primary city before comparing.
compareError: Could not load the comparison right now.
apiUnauthorized: OpenWeatherMap API key rejected. Verify account email confirmation, active free plan/subscription, and wait for key propagation (up to 2 hours).
apiLocationError: Could not load weather for your location.
apiGenericError: Could not load weather right now.
geolocationRequiresSecure: Geolocation requires HTTPS or localhost. Open via local server to use this feature.
geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported in this browser.
geolocationPermissionHelp: Location permission denied. Click the lock icon in the address bar and allow Location for this site.
shareNeedWeatherText: Load weather for a city before sharing.
shareNeedWeatherImage: Load weather for a city before generating the image.
shareTextFallbackSuccess: Text copied and WhatsApp Web opened.
shareTextError: Could not share text right now.
shareImageMissingLib: Capture library not loaded. Reload the page and try again.
shareImageFallbackSuccess: Image generated and downloaded. Caption copied for WhatsApp/Instagram.
shareImageError: Could not generate image right now.
chartAriaLabel: Temperature and rain chart for the next 12 hours
rainAlertMessage: Take an umbrella: rain chance of {chance}% around {time}.
rainAlertWindowMessage: Take an umbrella: peak rain chance {chance}% between {start} and {end}.
windAlertMessage: Wind warning: gusts of {gust} {unit}. Be extra careful in open areas.
severeStormMessage: Severe condition detected: thunderstorm risk in the area.
severeStormIncomingMessage: Severe condition detected: storm risk in the next hours.
severeHeatMessage: Severe condition detected: intense heat. Stay hydrated and avoid prolonged sun exposure.
severeHeatExtremeMessage: Severe condition detected: extreme heat expected. Avoid sun exposure and hydrate often.
severeWindMessage: Severe condition detected: strong winds in the area.
severeWindExtremeMessage: Severe condition detected: very strong winds expected in the next hours.
severeGustMessage: Severe condition detected: intense wind gusts in the area.
severeRainMessage: Severe condition detected: high chance of heavy rain ({chance}%) in the next hours.
dailySummaryIdle: Search for a city to generate a simple language day summary.
cinematicSceneDefaultNarrative: Load weather to see the visual narrative for this moment.
cinematicSceneNarrativeAurora: The city wakes with soft light and lighter air. A good window for early plans.
cinematicSceneNarrativeHeatDry: Today's scene is dry heat and open sky. Hydrate and prefer shade through peak afternoon.
cinematicSceneNarrativeColdFront: Shift signals ahead: dropping temperatures and rising humidity in the next hours.
cinematicSceneNarrativeRainApproach: Clouds are building and rain odds are rising. Plan movements with extra margin.
cinematicSceneNarrativeElectricNight: Night with sky energy: unstable weather and thunderstorm risk in the area.
cinematicSceneNarrativeCalmNight: A steadier night for short trips and open routes.
cinematicSceneNarrativeSteadyDay: Conditions are currently stable, with no critical short-term signals. Good for plans with basic caution.
cinematicSceneReasonIdle: Rain, wind, UV, AQI, and thermal variation feed this scene score.
cinematicSceneWhyTemplate: Current pressures: rain {rain}/100, wind {wind}/100, UV {uv}, AQI {aqi}, thermal variation {tempVariation}/100.
cinematicSceneRecommendationDefault: Load weather to receive contextual guidance.
cinematicSceneRecommendationAurora: Use this lighter window for early movements.
cinematicSceneRecommendationHeatDry: Hydrate and prioritize shade or breaks through peak heat.
cinematicSceneRecommendationColdFront: Carry an extra layer and allow buffer time for weather shifts.
cinematicSceneRecommendationRainApproach: Bring rain protection and add extra commute margin.
cinematicSceneRecommendationElectricNigh: Avoid exposed areas and delay longer trips if thunder builds.
cinematicSceneRecommendationCalmNight: Good slot for short trips with normal caution.
cinematicSceneRecommendationSteadyDay: Balanced conditions for routine plans, with light monitoring.
cinematicSceneTimelineIdle: Load a city to view +3h, +6h, and +12h.
departurePromptPlaceholder: If I leave at 6pm by motorcycle?
departureHint: Example: If I leave at 6:00pm by motorcycle? / in 2d by motorcycle
departureEmpty: Load a city to get an objective risk recommendation.
commuteSubtitle: Enter a destination to estimate real-time ETA and recalculate route risk.
commuteDestinationSuggestionsAriaLabel: Destination suggestions for the selected city
commuteEmpty: Load a city and enter a destination to calculate ETA and route risk.
commuteNoData: Load a city before calculating ETA and risk.
commuteDestinationRequired: Enter a destination to calculate the commute.
commuteDestinationOutOfCity: This destination seems outside {city}. Choose one inside the selected city.
commuteDestinationNotFound: Destination not found for route calculation.
commuteRouteUnavailable: Could not calculate ETA right now.
commuteRiskAdjustedLabel: Final score adjusted by ETA + route: {score}/100
commuteExplanationLine: ETA source: {provider}. Assessment blends arrival risk, window average risk, and peak conditions during transit.
commuteTrendInsufficient: Hourly trend: not enough recent history yet.
commuteTrendLine: Trend at {hour}: usually {delta} min vs recent average ({samples} records).
commuteWindowBestNow: Best window: leaving now is already the lowest-risk option in this horizon.
commuteWindowBestDelay: Best window: leave in {minutes} min to reduce risk from {current}/100 to {best}/100 (arrival {arrivalCurrent} -> {arrivalBest}).
sensitivitySubtitle: Tune the risk engine to your context (heat, rain, wind, or air quality).
departureNoData: Load weather before using the departure assistant.
departureInvalid: I could not parse that. Use: now, at HHh/HH:MM, minutes, hours, or days (e.g. 'at 18h', '15m', '3h', '2d').
departureBlockedSpeech: Please use respectful language in the assistant to receive a recommendation.
departureRecCriticalStorm: Avoid leaving at this time. If necessary, reduce travel and choose protected routes.
departureRecHighRainRide: High risk for two-wheel travel. If possible, postpone or switch to safer transport.
departureRecHighWindRide: Strong wind for two-wheel travel. Reduce speed and avoid exposed roads.
departureRecHeatOutdoor: Strong heat for outdoor activity. Hydrate, reduce pace, and avoid prolonged exposure.
departureRecModerate: Conditions are workable with caution. Carry proper protection and watch for quick shifts.
departureRecLow: Conditions look favorable. Keep basic attention and follow your plan.
planBDelayByMinutes: Delay departure by {minutes} min to reduce risk.
planBDelayGeneric: If possible, delay departure and re-check shortly.
planBSwitchTransport: Switch to car/app or a more protected transport option.
planBRainGear: Bring rain gear/umbrella and avoid flood-prone roads.
planBWindRoute: Prefer less exposed routes and reduce speed.
safeWindowIdle: Load weather to estimate the best window.
safeWindowUnavailable: No clear safe window in the next hours.
safeWindowNote: Estimate based on the next hours and current scenario.
safeWindowNoteUnavailable: The available forecast does not provide a consistent safe margin right now.
forecastReliabilitySubtitle: Score by hourly windows with factor-based explanation.
forecastReliabilityIdle: Load a city to compute reliability.
forecastReliabilityReason: Source {source}, {points} points, temp variability {tempVar}° and rain variability {rainVar}%.
rainRadarSubtitle: Animated overlay for fast visual reading in the next hours.
rainRadarStatusIdle: Load a city to start the radar.
rainRadarStatusFallback: Map is temporarily unavailable. Showing local precipitation trend instead.
rainRadarStatusZoomLimit: Radar zoom capped at level {level} to avoid unsupported tiles.
rainRadarStatusTileIssue: Some radar tiles failed; we adjusted to keep the view stable.
rainRadarStatusUnavailable: Map library is unavailable in this browser.
rainRadarPreviewEmpty: No rain data available to display.
healthContextIdle: Load a city to view health triggers.
healthFeelsExtreme: Extreme feels-like temperature: adjust outdoor intensity and exposure duration.
healthUvHigh: High UV: avoid intense outdoor training and use stronger sun protection.
healthHumidityLow: Very low humidity: hydrate more and avoid prolonged effort without breaks.
healthAqiPoor: Poor air quality: prefer indoor spaces and reduce intense activity.
healthNoAlerts: No critical health triggers at the moment.
exposureIndexIdleSummary: Load a city to calculate the exposure index.
exposureIndexIdleDriver: Waiting for health and atmosphere data.
exposureDriverHeatExtreme: Very high feels-like ({value}°): elevated thermal stress.
exposureDriverColdExtreme: Very low feels-like ({value}°): increased thermal discomfort risk.
exposureDriverHumidityCritical: Critical humidity ({value}%): hydration and frequent breaks are essential.
exposureDriverAqiHigh: Compromised air quality (AQI {value}): prefer moderate activity.
exposureDriverAqiSevere: Poor air quality (AQI {value}): minimize prolonged exposure.
exposureDriverStable: No elevated pressure from extreme heat, low humidity, or pollution at the moment.
weeklyInsightsIdle: Load a city to generate weekly insights.
weeklyNarrativeIdle: Load a city to generate the weekly cinematic narrative.
weeklyNarrativeNoForecast: Not enough forecast data to build the weekly narrative right now.
weeklyNarrativeSummary: Risk peak on {riskDay} at {riskTime}, under scene {riskScene} (score {riskScore}/100). Best window: {safeWindow}, scene {safeScene}. {trend}
weeklyInsightsSafeHoursFallback: No clearly safe daytime hours in the current horizon.
weeklyInsightsTrendImproving: Trend: risk is decreasing over the next days ({delta} pts).
weeklyInsightsTrendWorsening: Trend: risk is increasing over the next days ({delta} pts).
weeklyInsightsTrendStable: Trend: risk remains stable across the week.
weeklyInsightsPatternRain: Pattern: rain tends to concentrate in the {period}.
weeklyInsightsPatternWind: Pattern: stronger wind tends to occur in the {period}.
weeklyInsightsPatternStable: Pattern: steadier trend with no major rain/wind peaks.
weeklyInsightWhyFactors: Rain up to {rain}%, gust up to {gust} {speedUnit}, UV up to {uv}, AQI {aqi} ({aqiLabel}).
weeklyInsightWhyRiskDay: {day} had the highest average risk this week ({score}/100).
weeklyInsightWhyTopDriver: The most frequent variables in highest-risk slots were: {driver}.
weeklyInsightWhySafeHours: Selection uses the {count} lowest scores in active hours ({start}h-{end}h), avoiding overnight slots.
weeklyInsightWhySafeHoursFallbackExplain: Within active hours ({start}h-{end}h), scores stayed elevated or unstable.
weeklyInsightWhyTrendUp: Average risk rose from {start}/100 to {end}/100 in the analyzed horizon.
weeklyInsightWhyTrendDown: Average risk dropped from {start}/100 to {end}/100 in the analyzed horizon.
weeklyInsightWhyTrendStableExplain: Averages between start and end stayed close ({start}/100 -> {end}/100).
weeklyInsightWhyRainFocus: Rain carried the strongest pressure (peak {rain}%) and impacted the highest-risk windows.
weeklyInsightWhyWindFocus: Elevated gusts (up to {gust} {speedUnit}) concentrated travel risk.
weeklyInsightWhyStableFocus: No major rain/wind spikes; conditions stayed more uniform through the period.
